title: Outcome dashboard (acceptance + reuse events)
context: The Hee-Lee Oss 'delivered, not merged' standard requires tracking acceptance and reuse events. Currently these are recorded in the outcome ledger (JSON files) but there is no summary view. A lightweight dashboard that reads the outcome ledger and displays acceptance evidence, reuse events, and success-metric status makes the project's delivery evidence visible to contributors, maintainers, and potential partners — supporting the steward's work and the project's credibility.
objective: Implement a lightweight outcome dashboard that reads the project's outcome ledger (outcomes/*.json) and displays acceptance evidence, reuse events, and current status against the project's success metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard reads the outcome ledger (outcomes/*.json files in the repo) and displays: number of corpus releases, acceptance evidence per release (partner name or Zenodo DOI), recorded reuse events with external evidence links, and current success-metric status (license correctness, leakage counts, reuse event count).
Dashboard is static (no runtime server required): generates a static HTML/JSON summary from the ledger files that can be committed or served as a GitHub Pages artifact.
The dashboard accurately reflects what is in the ledger and does not interpolate or infer status not present in the ledger files.
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; commit is DCO signed-off; code MIT licensed.
resources: pmc-cancer-reuse-018 (outcome ledger format to read from)
PLAN.md (Success metrics table — the metrics the dashboard displays)
output: A merged PR adding a static outcome dashboard generator (TypeScript/ESM) that reads outcomes/*.json and emits a summary report of acceptance evidence, reuse events, and success-metric status.
